'''Uhanayih''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Yinchorri system]]. It was a lifeless rock close to the system's primary [[Star/Legends|star]]. In the [[Yinchorri (language)|Yinchorri language]], its name meant "within world," and it was associated with the spirit realm in the [[Yinchorri religion]]. During the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] technological and military buildup, the [[Yinchorri High Command|High Command]] built a [[Yinchorri command center|command center]] inside the world, giving its name new meaning. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] during the [[Yinchorri Uprising]], Uhanayih was [[Battle of Uhanayih|attacked]] by the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' name Uhanayih as a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]], when [[Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'']] makes it clear it is a planet.
